description_long: This helmet features a robust, rounded shell with a glossy black finish and metallic highlights. The front is adorned with a prominent gold emblem depicting a winged skull, adding a dramatic and decorative touch. The sides of the helmet are reinforced with angular black panels, each secured by visible rivets, enhancing its armored appearance. On both sides near the top, there are gold wing-like ornaments that further emphasize its bold, stylized design. The helmet appears to lack any visible ventilation openings or a visor, suggesting a focus on aesthetics and protection. The interior is not visible, but it is likely lined with padding for comfort and fit.
description: A glossy black helmet with gold winged skull emblems and reinforced side panels, featuring bold decorative elements and no visible visor or vents.
description_view_0: The left side of the helmet shows the gold wing ornament and the angular black side panel with rivets.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the gold winged skull emblem and the symmetrical design of the helmet's faceplate.
description_view_2: The right side mirrors the left, displaying the gold wing ornament and reinforced paneling.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the smooth, rounded back of the helmet with minimal detailing and no visible openings.
attribute_graphic_design: Gold winged skull emblem on the front and gold wing ornaments on the sides; otherwise solid black with no additional graphics.
